name: Hasan Taha Bagci
about: I am a fourth-year AI & Data Engineering student at Istanbul Technical University, currently conducting research at ITU Aerospace Research Center. My work focuses on developing intelligent autonomous systems through reinforcement learning, computer vision, and robotics. I have led award-winning UAV teams to world championships and published research on vision-based navigation in GNSS-denied environments.

researchInterests.topics: Policy optimization, multi-agent systems, UAV navigation, command & control architectures
Object detection, tracking, aerial imagery analysis, vision-based navigation, semantic segmentation, deep learning
Control systems, autonomous surveillance, system integration, adaptive control, GNC systems

experience.organization: Boston University Robotics Lab, Boston, USA
experience.description: Reinforcement learning, imitation learning, and visual navigation research under the supervision of Prof. John Baillieul.
Interactive LLM-driven avatars with real-time speech, gesture, and lip-sync capabilities.
AI and Guidance, Navigation & Control (GNC) research group. Developing reinforcement learning algorithms for UAV navigation and autonomous decision-making systems.
Led 24-person team to SUAS podium and multiple TEKNOFEST results.
Computer vision and autonomous systems development. Implemented detection and tracking algorithms for aerial platforms.
Research and development internship in applied AI and robotics.
UAV systems and aerospace engineering projects.
Campus community platform design and development.
Technology education and robotics instruction for high school students.

projects.title: Time-to-Transit Visual Navigation with IL Controller
projects.description: Imitation learning-based controller for visual navigation using time-to-transit metrics.

projects.title: AI-based Command & Control System
projects.description: Multi-agent reinforcement learning system for coordinated UAV operations and autonomous decision-making.

projects.title: Drone Interceptor System
projects.description: Real-time onboard detection and tracking system with sim-to-field transfer pipeline using ROS/Gazebo.

projects.title: Vision-Based Navigation in GNSS-Denied Environments
projects.description: Particle filter-based localization using visual feature synchronization. Published at ICNS 2025.

projects.title: Toothless Fixed-Wing UAV
projects.description: TEKNOFEST competition fixed-wing UAV design and development. Best in Design & 3rd Place.

projects.title: Lightning Cargo Drone
projects.description: SUAS competition cargo delivery drone system. World 1st (2023) and 2nd (2024) place.

projects.title: SignSense
projects.description: Deep learning-based sign language translation system using computer vision.

projects.title: Turkish Diacritization with BiLSTM
projects.description: Bidirectional LSTM model for Turkish text diacritization.

projects.title: Image Deblurring for Classification Boost
projects.description: Deblurring preprocessing pipeline to improve classification accuracy in aerial imagery.

projects.title: Database Management System
projects.description: Custom DBMS implementation with query optimization for high-performance data retrieval.

projects.title: Credit Card Approval Prediction
projects.description: Machine learning model for credit approval classification using ensemble methods.

projects.title: Interfaced AI Training App
projects.description: Educational platform for AI training and experimentation with interactive visualizations.

projects.title: See-It Visualizer
projects.description: Data visualization tool for complex datasets with real-time rendering.

publications.authors: Abdülbaki Şanlan, Hasan Taha Bağcı, Emre Koyuncu
publications.title: Particle Filter-Based Localization Using Visual Feature Synchronization in GNSS-Denied Navigation
